# The name of this automation "Robot"
name: SkyCheck CI Pipeline

# This tells the robot: "Wake up whenever I push new code to the main branch"
on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]

# These are the tasks the robot will perform
jobs:
  test-and-build:
    # GitHub will provide a free Linux computer for us to use
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      # Step 1: Tell the Linux computer to download your code from GitHub
      - name: Get the code from GitHub
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      # Step 2: Tell the Linux computer to try building your Docker image
      # This proves your Dockerfile actually works!
      - name: Test the Docker Build
        run: docker build -t skycheck-test .

      # Step3: Sonar Code Scan
      - name: SonarQube Scan
        uses: SonarSource/sonarqube-scan-action@v6
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
